Reconstruct text with highlights applied

Source: R/text_highlighting.R
reconstruct_text_with_highlights.Rd

Reconstruct text with highlights applied

Usage

reconstruct_text_with_highlights(original_text, sentence_table)

Arguments

original_text

Original markdown text

sentence_table

Sentence table with highlight flags

Value

Text with highlights applied

On this page

Developed by Nathan Layman.

list(text = “EcoReview - Human-in-the-loop review for ecological data extraction”)
